# Mumma's Menu

> Mumma's Menu is a home kitchen and cloud kitchen serving freshly made Indian comfort food — parathas, theplas, rotis, sabji, khichdi, Maharashtrian farali specials, and Maggi. No artificial colours, cooked fresh daily. Orders are placed by adding items to a cart and checking out via a pre-filled WhatsApp message.

## Key facts
- Cuisine: Indian, Gujarati, Maharashtrian, vegetarian
- Ordering: browse menu → add to cart → checkout on WhatsApp
- Price range: ₹20–₹200 per item
- No artificial colours; freshly cooked to order
- Fulfilment: self-pickup available now; delivery is arranged via a partner rider (Porter/Uber) until in-house delivery launches
- Some dishes need advance notice (up to ~5 hours) for preparation
- A monthly meal plan/subscription is in development

## Pages
- /menu — full categorized menu with prices
- /menu/{category} — individual category pages (parathas, thepla, beverages, rotis, sabji, khichdi, farali, maggie, extras)
- / — home page, includes an About section with the kitchen's story
- /contact — WhatsApp, phone, email, delivery area, hours

## Popular items
- Aloo Paratha — ₹60
- Paneer Butter Masala — ₹150
- Cheese Tadka Maggi — ₹80
- Sabudana Khichdi — ₹60 (fasting/farali friendly)
